recommendations.title: The Jesus Rolls
recommendations.overview: Hours after his release from prison, Jesus Quintana pairs up with fellow misfits Petey and Marie for a freewheeling joyride of petty crime and romance.

recommendations.title: Romance & Cigarettes
recommendations.overview: Ironworker Nick lives with his wife, Kitty, and three daughters. When he meets a significantly younger woman, Tula, he starts an affair with her, much to the chagrin of his wife, and his life is thrown into upheaval. Kitty kicks Nick out of the house

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: Midnight in Paris
recommendations.overview: While on a trip to Paris with his fiancée's family, a nostalgic screenwriter finds himself mysteriously going back to the 1920s every day at midnight.

recommendations.title: Desi Boyz
recommendations.overview: When two cash-strapped UK-based Indians become male escorts amid an economic downturn, money flows right in but everything else in their lives starts falling apart.

recommendations.title: Hannah and Her Sisters
recommendations.overview: Between two Thanksgivings, Hannah's husband falls in love with her sister Lee, while her hypochondriac ex-husband rekindles his relationship with her sister Holly.

recommendations.title: Husbands and Wives
recommendations.overview: When their best friends announce that they're separating, a professor and his wife discover the faults in their own marriage.

recommendations.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
recommendations.overview: Clark Griswold is on a quest to take his family to the Walley World theme park for a vacation, but things don't go exactly as planned.

recommendations.title: No One Will Save You
recommendations.overview: A lonely woman battles extraterrestrials who threaten her future while forcing her to face her past.
